name: Choose Trait
description: When you field Miss Fortune, choose between Conduit Mode, Challenger Mode, and Replicator Mode. Miss Fortune has a unique ability based on her mode and gains the associated trait.
tooltip: When you field Miss Fortune, choose between Conduit Mode, Challenger Mode, and Replicator Mode. Miss Fortune has a unique ability based on her mode and gains the associated trait.
importWarnings: Trait has no mapped executable effects
